series_metadata.series_description: File contains contracts and memoranda, ancillary documents, correspondence, addendums, sponsorships, etc. related to Responsible Gaming contracts, whether a party to the contract directly or indirectly

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for the life of the contract/agreement, plus six (6) years and one (1) day in accordance with O.R.C. 2305.06., Electronic: Delete
